ar: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدࣰّا وَلَا سُوَاعࣰا وَلَا یَغُوثَ وَیَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرࣰا
ar_simple: وَقَالُوا لَا تَذَرُنَّ آلِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
transliteration: waqālū lā tadharunna ālihatakum walā tadharunna waddan walā suwāʿan walā yaghūtha wayaʿūqa wanasran

t.sahih-int: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr
t.asad: inasmuch as they said [to their followers], 'Do not ever abandon your gods: abandon neither Wadd nor Suwa', and neither Yaghuth nor Ya’uq nor Nasr
t.yusuf-ali: And they have said (to each other), 'Abandon not your gods: Abandon neither Wadd nor Suwa', neither Yaguth nor Ya'uq, nor Nasr
t.pickthall: And they have said: Forsake not your gods. Forsake not Wadd, nor Suwa', nor Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr
t.arberry: and have said, "Do not leave your gods, and do not leave Wadd, nor Suwa', Yaghuth, Ya'uq, neither Nasr
t.hilali-khan: And they have said: 'You shall not leave your gods, nor shall you leave Wadd, nor Suwa', nor Yaghuth, nor Ya'uq, nor Nasr (names of the idols)
t.itani: And they said, “Do not give up your gods; do not give up Wadd, nor Souwa, nor Yaghoos, and Yaooq, and Nassr.
t.mubarakpuri: "And they have said: `You shall not leave your gods, nor shall you leave Wadd, nor Suwa`, nor Yaghuth, and Ya`uq and Nasr.' "
t.qarib: And said, 'Do not abandon your gods. Never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr
t.wahiduddin: and they said [to their followers], "Do not ever abandon your deities: abandon neither Wadd, nor Suwa', and neither Yaghuth, nor Yauq nor Nasr
t.shakir: And they say: By no means leave your gods, nor leave Wadd, nor Suwa; nor Yaghus, and Yauq and Nasr
t.haleem: saying, “Do not renounce your gods
t.maariful: and said (to their people), “Never forsake your gods, and never forsake Wadd, nor Suwā‘, nor Yaghūth and Ya‘ūq and Nasr
t.khattab: urging ˹their followers˺, ‘Do not abandon your idols—especially Wadd, Suwâ’, Yaghûth, Ya’ûq, and Nasr.’
t.ghali: And they have said, ‘Definitely do not leave (behind) your gods, and do not definitely leave behind Wadd or Suwa‘ or Yaghuth or Ya‘uq or Nasr (These are names of pagan gods)
t.irving: and said: ´Do not forsake your gods: do not leave Wadd, nor Suwa, nor Yaghuth, nor Yauq, nor Nasr!´
t.iwq: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka berkata: "Jangan sekali-kali kamu meninggalkan (penyembahan) tuhan-tuhan kamu dan jangan pula sekali-kali kamu meninggalkan (penyembahan) wadd, dan jangan pula suwwa', yaghuts, ya'uq dan nasr".
t_id.sabiq: Kepada orang-orang lemah itu mereka mengatakan, 'Jangan kalian tinggalkan menyembah tuhan- tuhan kalian. Dan jangan tinggalkan Wadd, Suwa', Yaghûts, Ya'ûq dan Nasr'." Sembahan itu adalah patung- patung yang dipahat dalam bentuk binatang yang bermacam-macam. Orang-orang yang diikuti itu sungguh telah menyesatkan banyak orang. Kekafiran dan kekukuhan orang-orang yang zalim itu hanya menambah mereka jauh dari kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata) kepada orang-orang yang menjadi bawahan mereka ("Jangan sekali-kali kalian meninggalkan tuhan-tuhan sesembahan kalian dan jangan pula sekali-kali kalian meninggalkan wadd) dapat dibaca waddan dan wuddan (dan jangan pula suwa', yaghuts, ya'uq dan nasr") nama-nama tersebut adalah nama-nama berhala-berhala mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka berkata: "Jangan sekali-kali kamu meninggalkan (penyembahan) tuhan-tuhan kamu dan jangan pula sekali-kali kamu meninggalkan (penyembahan) wadd, dan jangan pula suwwa', yaghuts, ya'uq dan nasr".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقالوا» للسفلة «لا تَذَرُنَّ آلهتكم ولا تذرن ودا» بفتح الواو وضمها «ولا سواعا ولا يغوث ويعوق ونسرا» هي أسماء أصنامهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدّٗا وَلَا سُوَاعٗا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرٗا (لَا تَذَرُنَّ: لَا تَتْرُكُنَّ, وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا: هَذِهِ أَسْمَاءُ أَصْنَامِهِمْ، وَكَانَتْ أَسْمَاءَ رِجَالٍ صَالِحِينَ لَمَّا مَاتُوا، زَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيْطَانُ أَنْ يُقِيمُوا لَهُمُ التَّمَاثِيلَ وَالصُّوَرَ؛ لِيَنْشَطُوا عَلَى الطَّاعَةِ إِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ، فَلَمَّا طَالَ الأَمَدُ، عَبَدُوهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata) kepada orang-orang yang menjadi bawahan mereka ("Jangan sekali-kali kalian meninggalkan tuhan-tuhan sesembahan kalian dan jangan pula sekali-kali kalian meninggalkan wadd) dapat dibaca waddan dan wuddan (dan jangan pula suwa', yaghuts, ya'uq dan nasr") nama-nama tersebut adalah nama-nama berhala-berhala mereka

ar: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِیرࣰاۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِینَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلࣰا
ar_simple: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَالًا
transliteration: waqad aḍallū kathīran walā tazidi l-ẓālimīna illā ḍalālan

t.sahih-int: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error
t.asad: And so they have led many a one astray: hence, ordain Thou that these evildoers stray but farther and farther away [from all that they may desire]
t.yusuf-ali: They have already misled many; and grant Thou no increase to the wrong-doers but in straying (from their mark)
t.pickthall: And they have led many astray, and Thou increasest the wrong-doers in naught save error
t.arberry: And they have led many astray. Increase Thou not the evildoers save in error
t.hilali-khan: And indeed they have led many astray. And (O Allah): 'Grant no increase to the Zalimun (polytheists, wrong-doers, and disbelievers, etc.) save error
t.itani: They have misled many, so do not increase the wrongdoers except in confusion.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And indeed they have led many astray. And (O Allah): `Grant no increase to the wrongdoers save error."'
t.qarib: They have already misled many. My Lord, increase these transgressors only in misguidance
t.wahiduddin: They have led many astray; so lead the wrongdoers to further error
t.shakir: And indeed they have led astray many, and do not increase the unjust in aught but error
t.haleem: Do not renounce Wadd, Suwa, Yaghuth, Yauq, or Nasr!” They have led many astray. Lord, bring nothing but destruction down on the evildoers!’
t.maariful: And they have led many astray. And (O my Lord,) let not the wrongdoers progress in anything but deviation from the right path.”
t.khattab: Those ˹elite˺ have already led many astray. So ˹O Lord˺, only allow the wrongdoers to stray farther away.”
t.ghali: (And they have already led many into error. And increase You Allah), the unjust ones in nothing except error
t.irving: They have led so many astray; just let wrongdoers go even farther astray!´
t.iwq: And already they have misled many. And, my Lord, do not increase the wrongdoers except in error

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesudahnya mereka menyesatkan kebanyakan (manusia); dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kesesatan.
t_id.sabiq: Kepada orang-orang lemah itu mereka mengatakan, 'Jangan kalian tinggalkan menyembah tuhan- tuhan kalian. Dan jangan tinggalkan Wadd, Suwa', Yaghûts, Ya'ûq dan Nasr'." Sembahan itu adalah patung- patung yang dipahat dalam bentuk binatang yang bermacam-macam. Orang-orang yang diikuti itu sungguh telah menyesatkan banyak orang. Kekafiran dan kekukuhan orang-orang yang zalim itu hanya menambah mereka jauh dari kebenaran.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya mereka telah menyesatkan) dengan nama-nama tersebut (kebanyakan manusia) karena mereka telah memerintahkan manusia untuk menyembahnya (dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang lalim itu selain kesesatan) ayat ini diathafkan kepada lafal qad adhalluu, yakni merupakan doa Nabi Nuh setelah Allah mewahyukan kepadanya, bahwasanya sekali-kali tidak ada orang yang mau beriman di antara kaummu, melainkan orang-orang yang telah beriman saja.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesudahnya mereka menyesatkan kebanyakan (manusia); dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kesesatan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقد أضلوا» بها «كثيرا» من الناس بأن أمروهم بعبادتهم «ولا تزد الظالمين إلا ضلالا» عطفا على قد أضلوا دعا عليهم لما أوحي إليه أنه لن يؤمن من قومك إلا من قد آمن
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرٗاۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلٗا (ضَلَالًا: بُعْدًا عَنِ الحَقِّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya mereka telah menyesatkan) dengan nama-nama tersebut (kebanyakan manusia) karena mereka telah memerintahkan manusia untuk menyembahnya (dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang lalim itu selain kesesatan) ayat ini diathafkan kepada lafal qad adhalluu, yakni merupakan doa Nabi Nuh setelah Allah mewahyukan kepadanya, bahwasanya sekali-kali tidak ada orang yang mau beriman di antara kaummu, melainkan orang-orang yang telah beriman saja

ar: مِّمَّا خَطِیۤءَـٰتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُوا۟ فَأُدۡخِلُوا۟ نَارࣰا فَلَمۡ یَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارࣰا
ar_simple: مِمَّا خَطِيئَاتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا فَأُدْخِلُوا نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا لَهُمْ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَنْصَارًا
transliteration: mimmā khaṭīātihim ugh'riqū fa-ud'khilū nāran falam yajidū lahum min dūni l-lahi anṣāran

t.sahih-int: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers
t.asad: And so, because of their sins, they were drowned [in the great flood], and were doomed to suffer the fire [of the hereafter]; and they found none who could succour them against God
t.yusuf-ali: Because of their sins they were drowned (in the flood), and were made to enter the Fire (of Punishment): and they found- in lieu of Allah- none to help them
t.pickthall: Because of their sins they were drowned, then made to enter a Fire. And they found they had no helpers in place of Allah
t.arberry: And because of their transgressions they were drowned, and admitted into a Fire, for they found not, apart from God, any to help them
t.hilali-khan: Because of their sins they were drowned, then were made to enter the Fire, and they found none to help them instead of Allah
t.itani: Because of their wrongs, they were drowned, and were hurled into a Fire. They did not find apart from God any helpers.
t.mubarakpuri: Because of their sins they were drowned, then were made to enter the Fire. And they found none to help them instead of Allah.
t.qarib: Because of their sins they were drowned and sent to Hell. They could not find any one to help them against God
t.wahiduddin: They were drowned and sent to Hell for their misdeeds; they found no one to help them against God
t.shakir: Because of their wrongs they were drowned, then made to enter fire, so they did not find any helpers besides Allah
t.haleem: They were drowned and sent to Hell for their evildoings: they found no one to help them against God
t.maariful: Because of their sins they were drowned, and then admitted into the Fire. So they found no helpers for them besides Allah
t.khattab: So because of their sins, they were drowned, then admitted into the Fire. And they found none to help them against Allah
t.ghali: For whatever offenses (they committed), they were drowned, and then were made to enter a Fire; so they did not find, apart from Allah, any ready vindicators
t.irving: Because of their mistakes, they were drowned and dispatched into the Fire. They did not find they had any supporters apart from God
t.iwq: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah any helpers

t_id.kemenag: Disebabkan kesalahan-kesalahan mereka, mereka ditenggelamkan lalu dimasukkan ke neraka, maka mereka tidak mendapat penolong-penolong bagi mereka selain dari Allah.
t_id.sabiq: Mereka ditenggelamkan dengan topan karena dosa-dosa mereka. Setelah binasa, mereka dimasukkan ke dalam api yang sangat menyala dan membakar. Dan mereka tidak mendapatkan--selain Allah--penolong yang dapat menyelamatkan mereka dari siksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Disebabkan) huruf maa di sini adalah huruf shilah atau penghubung (kesalahan-kesalahan mereka) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca khathii'aatihim dengan memakai huruf hamzah sesudah huruf ya (mereka ditenggelamkan) oleh banjir besar (lalu dimasukkan ke dalam neraka) yaitu mereka diazab sesudah mereka ditenggelamkan di bawah air (maka mereka tidak dapat menemukan selain) selain daripada (Allah, seseorang pun yang menolong mereka) yang dapat melindungi mereka dari azab.
t_id.iwq: Disebabkan kesalahan-kesalahan mereka, mereka ditenggelamkan lalu dimasukkan ke neraka, maka mereka tidak mendapat penolong-penolong bagi mereka selain dari Allah.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «مما» ما صلة «خطاياهم» وفي قراءة خطيئآتهم بالهمز «أُغرقوا» بالطوفان «فأُدْخِلوا نارا» عوقبوا بها عقب الإغراق تحت الماء «فلم يجدوا لهم من دون» أي غير «الله أنصارا» يمنعون عنهم العذاب
tafsir.siraj-ar: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارٗا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارٗا (مِمَّا خَطِيئَاتِهِمْ: بِسَبَبِ ذُنُوبِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Disebabkan) huruf maa di sini adalah huruf shilah atau penghubung (kesalahan-kesalahan mereka) menurut suatu qiraat dibaca khathii'aatihim dengan memakai huruf hamzah sesudah huruf ya (mereka ditenggelamkan) oleh banjir besar (lalu dimasukkan ke dalam neraka) yaitu mereka diazab sesudah mereka ditenggelamkan di bawah air (maka mereka tidak dapat menemukan selain) selain daripada (Allah, seseorang pun yang menolong mereka) yang dapat melindungi mereka dari azab

ar: وَقَالَ نُوحࣱ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَـٰفِرِینَ دَیَّارًا
ar_simple: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
transliteration: waqāla nūḥun rabbi lā tadhar ʿalā l-arḍi mina l-kāfirīna dayyāran

t.sahih-int: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant
t.asad: And Noah prayed: "O my Sustainer! Leave not on earth any of those who deny the truth
t.yusuf-ali: And Noah, said: "O my Lord! Leave not of the Unbelievers, a single one on earth
t.pickthall: And Noah said: My Lord! Leave not one of the disbelievers in the land
t.arberry: And Noah said, 'My Lord, leave not upon the earth of the unbelievers even one
t.hilali-khan: And Nuh (Noah) said: "My Lord! Leave not one of the disbelievers on the earth
t.itani: Noah said, “My Lord, do not leave of the unbelievers a single dweller on earth.
t.mubarakpuri: And Nuh said: "My Lord! Leave not one of the disbelievers on the earth Dayyar!"
t.qarib: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave a single unbeliever on the face of the earth
t.wahiduddin: Noah prayed, "O my Lord! Do not leave on earth a single one of those who deny the truth
t.shakir: And Nuh said: My Lord! leave not upon the land any dweller from among the unbelievers
t.haleem: And Noah said, ‘Lord, do not leave any of the disbelievers on the earth
t.maariful: And said NūH, “My Lord, do not leave on earth even a single inhabitant (surviving) out of the disbelievers
t.khattab: Noah had prayed, “My Lord! Do not leave a single disbeliever on earth
t.ghali: And Nuh said, "Lord! Do not leave (out) upon the earth of the disbelievers any residence-dweller
t.irving: Noah said: "My Lord, do not leave any disbelievers with homes upon the earth
t.iwq: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among those who disbelieve an inhabitant

t_id.kemenag: Nuh berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, janganlah Engkau biarkan seorangpun di antara orang-orang kafir itu tinggal di atas bumi.
t_id.sabiq: Setelah putus harapan melihat kaumnya, Nûh berdoa, "Ya Tuhanku, Janganlah Engkau sisakan seorang pun dari mereka hidup di muka bumi ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Nuh berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Janganlah Engkau biarkan seorang pun di antara orang-orang kafir itu tinggal di atas bumi) bertempat tinggal, makna yang dimaksud ialah jangan biarkan seorang pun di antara mereka.
t_id.iwq: Nuh berkata: "Ya Tuhanku, janganlah Engkau biarkan seorangpun di antara orang-orang kafir itu tinggal di atas bumi.

tafsir.muyassar-ar: وقال نوح -عليه السلام-  بعد يأسه من قومه:  ربِّ لا تترك من الكافرين بك أحدًا حيًّا على الأرض يدور ويتحرك. إنك إن تتركهم دون إهلاك يُضلوا عبادك الذين قد آمنوا بك عن طريق الحق، ولا يأت من أصلابهم وأرحامهم إلا مائل عن الحق شديد الكفر بك والعصيان لك. ربِّ اغفر لي ولوالديَّ ولمن دخل بيتي مؤمنًا، وللمؤمنين والمؤمنات بك، ولا تزد الكافرين إلا هلاكًا وخسرانًا في الدنيا والآخرة.
tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقال نوح رب لا تذر على الأرض من الكافرين ديَّارا» أي نازل دار، والمعنى أحدا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا (دَيَّارًا: أَحَدًا حَيًّا عَلَى الأَرْضِ يَدُورُ، وَيَتَحَرَّكُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Nuh berkata, "Ya Rabbku! Janganlah Engkau biarkan seorang pun di antara orang-orang kafir itu tinggal di atas bumi) bertempat tinggal, makna yang dimaksud ialah jangan biarkan seorang pun di antara mereka

ar: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ یُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا یَلِدُوۤا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرࣰا كَفَّارࣰا
ar_simple: إِنَّكَ إِنْ تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوا إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
transliteration: innaka in tadharhum yuḍillū ʿibādaka walā yalidū illā fājiran kaffāran

t.sahih-int: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever
t.asad: for, behold, If Thou dost leave them, they will [always try to] lead astray those who worship Thee, and will give birth to nothing but wickedness and stubborn ingratitude
t.yusuf-ali: For, if Thou dost leave (any of) them, they will but mislead Thy devotees, and they will breed none but wicked ungrateful ones
t.pickthall: If Thou shouldst leave them, they will mislead Thy slaves and will beget none save lewd ingrates
t.arberry: Surely, if Thou leavest them, they will lead Thy servants astray, and will beget none but unbelieving libertines
t.hilali-khan: If You leave them, they will mislead Your slaves, and they will beget none but wicked disbelievers
t.itani: If You leave them, they will mislead your servants, and will breed only wicked unbelievers.
t.mubarakpuri: "If You leave them, they will mislead Your servants, and they will beget none but wicked disbelievers."
t.qarib: If You leave them, they will mislead Your worshipers and breed only wicked unbelievers
t.wahiduddin: if You leave any, they will misguide Your servants, and they will beget none but sinners and deniers of truth
t.shakir: For surely if Thou leave them they will lead astray Thy servants, and will not beget any but immoral, ungrateful (children)
t.haleem: if you leave them they will lead Your servants astray and beget only sinners and disbelievers
t.maariful: If You leave them (surviving), they will lead Your servants astray, and will beget none but a sinful disbeliever
t.khattab: For if You spare ˹any of˺ them, they will certainly mislead Your servants, and give birth only to ˹wicked˺ sinners, staunch disbelievers
t.ghali: Surely in case You leave them behind, they will lead Your bondmen into error, and will beget none except the most- disbelieving impious
t.irving: If You should leave them any, they will lead Your servants astray and will only breed loose-living disbelievers
t.iwq: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except every wicked one and confirmed disbeliever

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya jika Engkau biarkan mereka tinggal, niscaya mereka akan menyesatkan hamba-hamba-Mu, dan mereka tidak akan melahirkan selain anak yang berbuat maksiat lagi sangat kafir.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya, Ya Tuhanku, jika Engkau tidak membinasakan dan membumi-hanguskan mereka, mereka akan menjerumuskan hamba-hamba-Mu ke dalam kesesatan dan mereka hanya akan melahirkan keturunan yang jauh dari kebenaran serta sangat kufur dan durhaka terhadap-Mu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya jika Engkau biarkan mereka tinggal, niscaya mereka akan menyesatkan hamba-hamba-Mu, dan mereka tidak akan melahirkan selain anak yang berbuat maksiat lagi sangat kafir) lafal faajiran dan kaffaaran berasal dari yafjuru dan yakfuru. Nabi Nuh berdoa demikian setelah ada wahyu mengenai keadaan mereka yang telah disebutkan tadi yakni, bahwa mereka tidak akan beriman, kecuali hanya orang-orang yang telah beriman kepadanya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya jika Engkau biarkan mereka tinggal, niscaya mereka akan menyesatkan hamba-hamba-Mu, dan mereka tidak akan melahirkan selain anak yang berbuat maksiat lagi sangat kafir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنك إن تذرهم يُضلوا عبادك ولا يلدوا إلا فاجرا كفارا» من يفجر ويكفر، قال ذلك لما تقدم من الإيحاء إليه
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرٗا كَفَّارٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya jika Engkau biarkan mereka tinggal, niscaya mereka akan menyesatkan hamba-hamba-Mu, dan mereka tidak akan melahirkan selain anak yang berbuat maksiat lagi sangat kafir) lafal faajiran dan kaffaaran berasal dari yafjuru dan yakfuru. Nabi Nuh berdoa demikian setelah ada wahyu mengenai keadaan mereka yang telah disebutkan tadi yakni, bahwa mereka tidak akan beriman, kecuali hanya orang-orang yang telah beriman kepadanya

ar: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِی وَلِوَ ٰلِدَیَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَیۡتِیَ مُؤۡمِنࣰا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِینَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَـٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِینَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
ar_simple: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَنْ دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا
transliteration: rabbi igh'fir lī waliwālidayya waliman dakhala baytiya mu'minan walil'mu'minīna wal-mu'mināti walā tazidi l-ẓālimīna illā tabāran

t.sahih-int: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction
t.asad: O my Sustainer! Grant Thy forgiveness unto me and unto my parents, and unto everyone who enters my house as a believer, and unto all believing men and believing women [of later times]; and grant Thou that the doers of evil shall increasingly meet with destruction
t.yusuf-ali: O my Lord! Forgive me, my parents, all who enter my house in Faith, and (all) believing men and believing women: and to the wrong-doers grant Thou no increase but in perdition
t.pickthall: My Lord! Forgive me and my parents and him who entereth my house believing, and believing men and believing women, and increase not the wrong-doers in aught save ruin
t.arberry: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whosoever enters my house as a believer, and the believers, men and women alike; and do Thou not increase the evildoers save in ruin
t.hilali-khan: My Lord! Forgive me, and my parents, and him who enters my home as a believer, and all the believing men and women. And to the Zalimun (polytheists, wrong-doers, and disbelievers, etc.) grant You no increase but destruction
t.itani: My Lord! Forgive me and my parents, and anyone who enters my home in faith, and all the believing men and believing women; and do not increase the wrongdoers except in perdition.”
t.mubarakpuri: "My Lord! Forgive me, and my parents, and him who enters my home as a believer, and all the believing men and women. And to the wrongdoers grant You no increase but destruction!") Allah says,
t.qarib: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house as a believer. Forgive all the believing men and women, but bring nothing but ruin down on the transgressors
t.wahiduddin: Lord! Forgive me and my parents and every true believer who enters my house, forgive all the believing men and believing women; and bestow no increase upon the wrongdoers except in ruin
t.shakir: My Lord! forgive me and my parents and him who enters my house believing, and the believing men and the believing women; and do not increase the unjust in aught but destruction
t.haleem: Lord, forgive me, my parents, and whoever enters my house as a believer. Forgive believing men and women but bring nothing but ruin down on the evildoers!’
t.maariful: My Lord, grant pardon to me, and to my parents, and to everyone who enters my home as a believer, and to all the believing men and believing women, and do not increase the wrongdoers but in ruin
t.khattab: My Lord! Forgive me, my parents, and whoever enters my house in faith, and ˹all˺ believing men and women. And increase the wrongdoers only in destruction.”
t.ghali: Lord, Forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my home as believer, and male believers and female believers; and do not increase the unjust ones except in annihilation
t.irving: My Lord, forgive me and my parents, as well as anyone who enters my house as a believer, plus believing men and believing women! Do not increase wrongdoers in anything except destruction
t.iwq: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase those who do wrong except in destruction

t_id.kemenag: Ya Tuhanku! Ampunilah aku, ibu bapakku, orang yang masuk ke rumahku dengan beriman dan semua orang yang beriman laki-laki dan perempuan. Dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kebinasaan".
t_id.sabiq: Ya Tuhanku, ampunilah aku, ibu-bapakku yang menyebabkan aku hidup, orang yang masuk ke rumahku dalam keadaan beriman dan semua orang-orang Mukmin, laki-laki dan perempuan. Dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan kepada orang-orang kafir itu kecuali kebinasaan."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Ampunilah aku, ibu bapakku) kedua orang tua Nabi Nuh termasuk orang-orang yang beriman (orang yang masuk ke dalam rumahku) atau mesjidku (dengan beriman, dan semua orang yang beriman laki-laki dan perempuan) hingga hari kiamat nanti (dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan kepada orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kebinasaan.") Atau kehancuran, akhirnya mereka benar-benar dibinasakan.
t_id.iwq: Ya Tuhanku! Ampunilah aku, ibu bapakku, orang yang masuk ke rumahku dengan beriman dan semua orang yang beriman laki-laki dan perempuan. Dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan bagi orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kebinasaan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «رب اغفر لي ولوالديَّ» وكانا مؤمنين «ولمن دخل بيتي» منزلي أو مسجدي «مؤمنا وللمؤمنين والمؤمنات» إلى يوم القيامة «ولا تزد الظالمين إلا تبارا» هلاكا فأهلكوا
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنٗا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا (تَبَارًا: هَلَاكًا، وَخُسْرَانًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ya Rabbku! Ampunilah aku, ibu bapakku) kedua orang tua Nabi Nuh termasuk orang-orang yang beriman (orang yang masuk ke dalam rumahku) atau mesjidku (dengan beriman, dan semua orang yang beriman laki-laki dan perempuan) hingga hari kiamat nanti (dan janganlah Engkau tambahkan kepada orang-orang yang zalim itu selain kebinasaan.") Atau kehancuran, akhirnya mereka benar-benar dibinasakan
